name: nsp-downloader
description: Multi-threaded download accelerator powered by aria2

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && vite build
scripts.test: node tests/garbled.test.js && node tests/extension-sniffer.test.js && node tests/download-intercept.test.js && node tests/tiktok-video.test.js && node tests/douyin-video.test.js && node tests/social-video.test.js
